name: Rapid Critical Metals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 58% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0390, stop A$0.0287, target A$0.0440 (0.49:1) — then trail it.
